corrections.note: Printed text reads πίστιν, not πᾶσιν.
Lemma in apparatus matches body word προσηνέγκαμεν/προσενέγκαμεν, not προσγεγραμμεν.

uncertain.note: Body appears to print προσηνέγκαμεν (or possibly προσενέγκαμεν without eta after sigma); transcription has προσηνέγκαμεν. Not certain enough to correct orthography.

notes: Running head matches. Body otherwise agrees, including line-initial A and page number omitted from body. Apparatus mostly correct; one clear misread in lemma at 1:8.
